input.question: What is the average fill rate of course sections?

payload.question: What is the average fill rate of course sections?

output.sql:
SELECT
  AVG(CASE WHEN capacity > 0 THEN CAST(enrolled_count AS FLOAT)/NULLIF(capacity,0) ELSE NULL END) AS average_fill_rate,
  COUNT(*) AS section_count
FROM course_sections

visualization.title: Average fill rate of course sections
visualization.description: Shows the overall average fill rate (enrolled / capacity) across all course sections and the number of sections used in the calculation.

payload.sql:
SELECT
  AVG(CASE WHEN capacity > 0 THEN CAST(enrolled_count AS FLOAT)/NULLIF(capacity,0) ELSE NULL END) AS average_fill_rate,
  COUNT(*) AS section_count
FROM course_sections
